name: Host huddle template
description: Short huddle template for reviewing reservation waves, quote logic, arrival pressure, and escalation rules before the front door gets stressed.
source_ref: core-v2: local operating rhythm at intake should shape promises, not just react to them
usage_moment: Use 10 to 15 minutes before peak arrivals or any major reservation wave.
expected_output: A brief pacing huddle with quote decisions, pressure notes, and a named escalation owner.
